content_body:
Blue Ridge Olive Oil Company is located in 4 locations in the Blue Ridge area ensuring that you have ample opportunity to try their olive oils! Tom and Donna Harper are the proud owners and they come from diverse backgrounds. Together they found their way to believing in the purity and health benefits of olive oil and are pleased to be able to bring that opportunity directly to you. 


Their International Olive Oil and Vinegar tasting room provides customers a special treat and opportunity to taste olive oils and balsamic vinegars from around the world before they buy. The pleasure of sampling oils and vinegars is an old European custom and Blue Ridge Olive Oil Company now brings that tradition to the North Georgia Mountains.
title: Blue Ridge Olive Oil Company
